## OVERVIEW

Building Your Copywriting Business (BYCB) is Clayton Makepeace's comprehensive training system delivered through AWAI. It spans three interconnected programs that cover the full arc from learning to write copy, to building a six-figure copywriting business, to transcending freelancing entirely through the partnership model.

---

## PROGRAMS

### Program 1: Main Course (BYCB Core)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | Building Your Copywriting Business — Main Course |
| **Structure** | Intro + 7 Modules + Peers Section |
| **Files Selected** | ~20 |
| **Focus** | Copywriting craft, research methodology, emotional writing, client work |
| **Key Topics** | Dominant emotion discovery, research protocol (90/10), Makepeace Sales Architecture (21 components), headline formulas, proof stacks, emotional temperature escalation |

**Modules:**
- Intro: Money philosophy, wealth mindset, perpetual student
- Module 1: Research fundamentals, market analysis
- Module 2: Headlines and leads (Emotional Selling Proposition)
- Module 3: Body copy, proof insertion, emotional escalation
- Module 4: Offers, guarantees, close architecture
- Module 5: Revision, peer review, optimization
- Module 6: Client communication, project management
- Module 7: Advanced techniques, control writing
- Peers: Gary Bencivenga stories, Jim Rutz stories, Parris Lampropoulos, peer learning network

### Program 2: Six-Figure Copywriting Business (SF)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | How to Build a Six-Figure Copywriting Business |
| **Structure** | 7 Modules + 2 Reports |
| **Files Selected** | ~9 |
| **Focus** | Business building, self-promotion, client acquisition, income optimization |
| **Key Topics** | Self-promotion as sample, client acquisition funnel, income leverage model, scarcity leverage, portfolio creation, fee structuring |

**Modules:**
- Module 1: Copywriting as scarce resource, market positioning
- Module 2: Self-promotion package creation (your sample IS your promotion)
- Module 3: Client research and targeting
- Module 4: Income optimization (amount x time), $/hour maximization
- Module 5: Portfolio building, testimonial collection
- Module 6: Fee structures (flat, retainer, royalty intro)
- Module 7: Client retention and relationship deepening

**Reports:**
- Report 1: Quick-start client acquisition
- Report 2: Income scaling strategies

### Program 3: Makepeace Business System (MBS)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | The Makepeace Business System |
| **Structure** | 8 Modules + 6 Reports |
| **Files Selected** | ~13 |
| **Focus** | Partnership/royalty model, business architecture, internet marketing models |
| **Key Topics** | Freelance vs partnership, royalty negotiation, equity deals, 5 internet models, killer product identification, Client Catch System, business architecture |

**Modules:**
- Module 1: Why freelancing is broken, partnership introduction
- Module 2: Partnership levels (freelance -> retainer -> royalty -> equity -> full partner)
- Module 3: Finding partnership-worthy clients
- Module 4: Negotiating royalty and equity terms
- Module 5: Building your business architecture
- Module 6: Internet marketing adaptation (5 models)
- Module 7: Scaling through multiple partnerships
- Module 8: Exit strategies and long-term wealth

**Reports:**
- "Six Figures is Chump Change" — Why $100K is settling, $4M+ path
- "5 Internet Marketing Models" — Direct sale, affiliate, subscription, freemium, partnership
- "How to Find Killer Products" — 7-filter product evaluation methodology
- "The Most Overlooked Skill in Direct Marketing" — Client relationship management
- "How to Catch Clients" — 7-step client acquisition system
- "Partnership Deal Structures" — Template terms and negotiation scripts
